zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Hanham於1358年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Simon Hanham37歲，母親Agnes Hamaps35歲。她於大約1374年與Robert Cheddar在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1437年4月10日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Hanham于1358年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Simon Hanham37岁，母亲Agnes Hamaps35岁。她于大约1374年与Robert Cheddar在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1437年4月10日在英国英格兰薩默塞特享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hanham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hannum
meanings: habitational name from Old Norse afnám ‘newly enclosed plot taken from common or undeveloped land’, a frequent minor placename in northern counties, e.g. Avenham Park in Preston (Lancashire) and Aynhems in Rimington (Yorkshire), sometimes with prosthetic H-, as in Haynholme in Draughton (Yorkshire).

habitational name from Hanham (Gloucestershire), from Old English hānum ‘(at) the stones’, dative plural form of hān ‘stone’. The ending -ham comes by analogy with other placenames with this very common unstressed ending.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Hanham was born in 1358, in Gloucestershire, England, her father, Simon Hanham, was 37 and her mother, Agnes Hamaps, was 35. She married Robert Cheddar about 1374, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 10 April 1437, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Thorncombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Hanham est née en 1358, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Simon Hanham, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes Hamaps, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Cheddar environ 1374, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1437, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Thorncombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Hanham 1358 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon Hanham 37 und ihre Mutter Agnes Hamaps 35. Sie hat um 1374 in Somerset, England Robert Cheddar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 10. April 1437 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Thorncombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Hanham è nata il nel 1358 nel Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Simon Hanham, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Agnes Hamaps, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Robert Cheddar circa 1374, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 10 aprile 1437, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Thorncombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Hanhamが1358年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Simon Hanhamは37歳，母Agnes Hamapsは35歳であった。約1374年にイギリスソメルセトでRobert Cheddarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1437年4月10日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンソルンコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Hanham(이)가 1358년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon Hanham(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Hamaps(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1374년 영국 서머세트에서 Robert Cheddar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1437년 4월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 토른코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Hanham nasceu em 1358, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon Hanham, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Hamaps, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Cheddar aproximadamente 1374, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1437, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Thorncombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Hanham родилась в 1358 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Simon Hanham было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Hamaps, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Cheddar около 1374 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 10 апреля 1437 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности таурнкомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Hanham nació en 1358, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon Hanham, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Agnes Hamaps, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Robert Cheddar aproximadamente 1374, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 10 de abril de 1437, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Thorncombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
